nasb.text: until the day when He was taken up to heaven, after He had by the Holy Spirit given orders to the apostles whom He had chosen.

esv.text: until the day when he was taken up, after he had given commands through the Holy Spirit to the apostles whom he had chosen.

cnv.text: 一直到他藉著聖靈吩咐所揀選的使徒之後，被接上升的日子為止。

ccb.text: 一直谈到祂借着圣灵吩咐了自己选立的使徒，然后被接回天上。

csbs.text: 一直到他藉着圣灵吩咐了他所拣选的使徒们之后，被接升天的那一天为止。
